subject: Fermi GBM trigger 463422723/150908689 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 463422723/150908689
at 16:31:59.43 UT on 8 September 2015, tentatively classified as a
GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a particle
event."
